operator: STF host (Aktse) or Länta family (Anne-Sophie), alternating
how_it_works: Twice daily, all summer. No booking needed. From Aktse: notify host evening before or that morning. From Laitaure: raise jetty flag by 09:00 or 17:00. Cash only, pay before boarding. Weather can delay/cancel.

season.stf_departures: Aktse -> Laitaure 09:00/17:00, Laitaure -> Aktse 09:15/17:15. 13 Sep: afternoon cancelled (cabins close midday).

price.conflict_note: Sources disagree (300 vs 250 SEK adult) -- operator page self-flags as outdated. Trust STF's 300, confirm by phone.

booking: Not required. Notify Aktse host ahead, or use Laitaure flag system.

contact.best_call_time: Evenings 19:00-21:00 for bookings; ~07:00 for same-day cancellations.
contact.note: Family also runs separate paid trips (Aktse -> Nammasj/Sarek, Cykelstigen) -- different route/price, not relevant here.

sources.note: Operator's own page, ~2023, self-flagged outdated prices. Trust operational details, not the price.
More recently updated secondary source; used for the price figure.
